decks.notes: The deck focuses on deploying aggressive creatures quickly, using discard outlets like Wild Mongrel and Tireless Tribe to power out big threats like Arrogant Wurm. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast, efficient offense while disrupting their game plan with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Cursed Scroll. The inclusion of Madness cards like Basking Rootwalla and Call of the Herd adds versatility and additional threats to the deck. The mana base is optimized for efficient casting of spells, with a mix of creature lands and utility lands like Gaea's Cradle.

The deck focuses on quickly putting creatures on the board and utilizing madness cards to gain advantage over the opponent. By discarding cards with madness costs and using cards like Circular Logic, the deck can maintain board presence while disrupting the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes card draw and counterspells to ensure it can keep up the pressure and control the game. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and disruptive plays in order to secure a quick victory.

The deck is focused on building a strong board presence quickly by playing powerful Goblin creatures like Goblin Piledriver, Goblin Warchief, and Goblin Ringleader. The deck also includes utility cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Gempalm Incinerator to maintain pressure and control the board. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures while utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to search for key pieces in the deck. The inclusion of removal spells like Naturalize and Sparksmith helps to deal with problematic cards or strategies from the opponent. Additionally, having land disruption with cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland adds another layer of control to the deck.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy using a combination of hand disruption spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy, while controlling the board with removal spells like Smother and Pernicious Deed. The deck also aims to generate card advantage with creatures like Yavimaya Elder and Wall of Blossoms, while maintaining a solid board presence with cards like Blastoderm and Treetop Village. The inclusion of cards like Dust Bowl and Wall of Roots helps to further control the opponent's resources and disrupt their strategy, ultimately leading to a victory through attrition.

This deck focuses on slowing down and disrupting the opponent's game plan by utilizing a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. The key strategy revolves around resolving [[Standstill]] to force the opponent to either stop playing cards or give you three free cards. The deck also includes a variety of land destruction and creature threats to control the board and out-value the opponent. By finding the right balance between control elements and win conditions, this deck aims to outlast and outplay the opponent in a war of attrition.

The strategy of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures such as Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Symbiotic Wurm, using cards like Dark Ritual and Careful Study. Then, use Reanimate and Exhume to bring those creatures back onto the battlefield at a discounted cost. Cabal Therapy and Duress help to disrupt the opponent's hand and clear the way for the combo to go off. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats early in the game and apply pressure while also being able to disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing the combo between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly get a powerful creature on the board while also disrupting the opponent's plans. It includes a mix of counterspells, draw spells, and utility cards to support the combo and maintain control of the game. By effectively managing resources and timing plays, the deck aims to create a fast and resilient win condition through the stifling of key abilities and the deployment of a formidable threat.

The deck revolves around playing Phyrexian Dreadnought and then countering any attempts to remove it with Stifle, Foil, or Counterspell. The combo relies on quickly finding Phyrexian Dreadnought and protecting it while also drawing cards to maintain card advantage. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Daze and Flash of Insight to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the key concept of the deck is to assemble the combo pieces efficiently and protect them while disrupting the opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with low-cost creatures and burn spells. By efficiently using resources and applying constant pressure, it aims to reduce the opponent's life total to zero as fast as possible. It includes a mix of aggressive creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Ball Lightning, along with direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate. With cards like Grim Lavamancer providing additional reach and burn spells like Fireblast for finishing blows, the deck aims to win the game in the early turns before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on aggressive play with a Madness theme, utilizing cards such as Wild Mongrel and Basking Rootwalla to quickly put pressure on the opponent. The strategy involves using cards with the Madness ability to efficiently cast spells from the graveyard, while being supported by other efficient creatures like Patrol Hound and Savannah Lions. With a mix of removal spells and cards like Call of the Herd and Arrogant Wurm to generate value, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful board presence.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Stiflenought combo, which involves playing Phyrexian Dreadnought and then Stifle to counter its triggered ability, allowing the player to bring out a powerful 12/12 creature for only one mana. The deck also includes a mix of counterspells, card draw, and manipulation spells to control the game and protect the combo. The goal is to quickly assemble the combo and overwhelm the opponent with a massive threat that is difficult to deal with.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing powerful counterspells and removal spells like Mana Leak, Counterspell, and Swords to Plowshares. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Disenchant and Decree of Justice, while also generating card advantage with Fact or Fiction and Impulse. The deck can stall the game out with Standstill and sweep the board with Wrath of God if needed. It also has utility lands like Mishra's Factory and Dust Bowl for additional control options. With efficient card selection and powerful control elements, this deck aims to dominate the opponent in a slow and methodical manner.

The main concept of this premodern control deck is to effectively disrupt and control the opponent's game plan using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and land destruction. By using cards like Meddling Mage, Mana Leak, and Swords to Plowshares, the deck aims to prevent the opponent from developing their board while gradually gaining advantage through cards like Weathered Wayfarer and Standstill. The inclusion of creatures like Whipcorder and Exalted Angel provide ways to close out the game once the opponent's resources have been depleted. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the game tempo and finding the right solution to secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures that have madness cards like Basking Rootwalla and Wild Mongrel to quickly apply pressure on the opponent. It also includes cards like Patrol Hound and Tireless Tribe to support the aggressive strategy. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient creatures while using cards like Rancor and Swords to Plowshares to maintain board control. The mana base includes cards like Mishra's Factory and Gaea's Cradle to ensure consistent early game plays. The overall goal is to outpace the opponent and secure a quick victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using enchantments like Wild Growth and Enchantress's Presence, then use powerful enchantments like Opalescence and Serra's Sanctum to create a game-winning combo. The deck also includes key cards like Sterling Grove and Parallax Wave to control the opponent's board, while also utilizing Solitary Confinement for protection. With strong card draw from Enchantress effects and Mirri's Guile, the deck aims to set up a lock on the game and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful enchantment combo.

The focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle in order to create a powerful and difficult-to-answer threat on the battlefield. The deck includes various cards to control the opponent's plays, such as Counterspell and Portent, while also providing card draw with Gush and Accumulated Knowledge. By effectively disrupting the opponent's game plan and protecting the combo pieces, this deck aims to take control of the game and win through a fast and efficient win condition.
